mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) signals robust economic expansion, which typically boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are negative in 60%+ of quarters with GDPC1 growth > 1.5% annualized.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent monthly CPI inflation above 205 (CPIAUCSL) triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns exceed 1.5% in 50%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 205.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payrolls (PAYEMS) indicates strong supply-side momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of INDPRO/PAYEMS combination drops below 0.05 over 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) create headwinds for equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns exceed 1.0% in 40%+ of periods with FEDFUNDS > 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate below 4.5% (UNRATE) signals tight labor markets, prompting inflationary pressures and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns exceed 0.8% in 50%+ of instances with UNRATE < 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly federal funds rate below 4.5% (FEDFUNDS) indicates accommodative monetary policy, which supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns fall below 0.5% in 60%+ of periods with FEDFUNDS < 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) reflects strong consumer and business demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of RSAFS/HOUST combination drops below 0.03 over 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly industrial production growth (INDPRO) above 115 signals improving manufacturing activity, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative in 50%+ of months with INDPRO growth > 1.0%.
